---
title: "Assignment 7.1"
author: "Kunaal Raghav"
format: pptx
editor: visual
---

## Download the Necessary Packages

```{r}
#Install the Package by removing the following  hashtag from each of the "install.packages"
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("openxlsx")

#Then library the packages
library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
```

## Bullets

```{r}
World_Bank <-read.xlsx("C:/Users/xbox/OneDrive/Collect Files/Collect Files/MPP- Graduate  AU/Graduate Paperwork/PUAD 650/WorldDev.xlsx")

World_Bank2 <- World_Bank %>%
  rename("1960" = "1960.[YR1960]",
         "1961" = "1961.[YR1961]",
         "1962" = "1962.[YR1962]",
         "1963" = "1963.[YR1963]",
         "1964" = "1964.[YR1964]",
         "1965" = "1965.[YR1965]",
         "1966" = "1966.[YR1966]",
         "1967" = "1967.[YR1967]")




World_Bank2
```

## Slide

## Slide
